## What

<!-- What does this change do? -->

## Why

<!-- What problem does it solve, or what is it for? Link an issue if there is one. -->

## How tested

<!-- How did you verify this works — which test suites, and any manual steps. -->

- [ ] `bun run test` passes
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] End-to-end suite run (if this touches browser-facing behavior) — see [Testing](../README.md#testing)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages are single-line, no emojis
- [ ] No emojis in code, comments, or docs
- [ ] README / AGENTS.md updated if this changes documented behavior
